connect69.description: Connect to TFTP server {{HOST}} on default port 69

demo-session.description: Demo: full TFTP session — connect, set mode, transfer files

steps.display: A simple, no-auth file transfer protocol over UDP.
Common uses: PXE boot, router config backup, firmware updates.
Step 1: Connect to the TFTP server
Step 3: Set binary mode (for non-text files)
Step 5: Get a file from the server
Step 6: Put a file to the server
